How we work

Your spa, in five steps

01

Fill out the form

Tell us what you are looking for and your availability in under a minute.

02

We advise you

An expert contacts you to understand your needs and propose the ideal spa.

03

Fast installation

Our technical team takes care of delivery and professional installation.

04

System setup

We set up the system, perform the first fill, and verify everything works properly.

05

Enjoy

We deliver your spa ready to use, with a demonstration and ongoing support.

FAQ

Have questions?

We answer the most common questions before you take the step. And if you have any others, write to us.

The average delivery time is 5 days. For special cases or custom models we may extend the timeframe, but we always confirm it when you place the order.

Yes, besides installation we offer all the products needed for proper water maintenance, plus filters, accessories, and premium thermal covers.

Yes, we offer flexible financing options with competitive terms. Ask us with no obligation and we will explain the plans available based on your profile.

Of course. We have showrooms in Marbella and Alicante with more than 30 models on display. We recommend booking an appointment so we can advise you with peace of mind.

All our spas come with a warranty so you can enjoy a safe, reliable experience with total peace of mind from day one. Our in-house technical team responds quickly to any need.

About us

ProGibe SPA, leaders in wellness spaces

At ProGibe Spa we are specialists in creating wellness spaces through the installation of spas, saunas, and hammams from the leading brands on the market. Our commitment is to offer personalized service, ensuring every client enjoys a relaxation environment tailored to their needs.

[ WARRANTY ] In addition, all our spas come with a warranty so you can enjoy a safe, reliable experience with complete peace of mind from day one.

  • Personalized attention At every stage of the purchase and installation process.
  • Fast delivery So you can enjoy your spa or sauna as soon as possible.
  • In-house technical service Maintenance and professional support throughout the entire product life.
  • After-sales service Continuous attention after delivery to solve any need.
